# R044 Conditioned C34 Bounded Residual Run01

## Summary

- Branch: `exp/R044-conditioned-c34-bounded-residual-v1`
- Model: `dformerv2_conditioned_c34_bounded_residual`
- Run: `R044_conditioned_c34_bounded_residual_run01`
- Hypothesis: condition the c3/c4 bounded depth residual amplitude on DFormerv2 c4 global pooled features, testing whether image/channel-specific residual opening improves over R036 static alpha while preserving the original GatedFusion base.
